description: This file provides functions for interacting with the roles table in a MySQL database, including counting, listing, bulk inserting roles, and searching roles based on various filters. It constitutes a repository module for role data management within a Node.js backend.

methods.name: _jsonParseIfNeeded(v)
methods.description: Parses a value as JSON if it is a string; returns the value as-is if it is already an object or null.

methods.name: countRoles()
methods.description: Returns the total number of roles in the roles table.

methods.name: listRoles({ limit = 1000 } = {})
methods.description: Retrieves a list of roles with optional limit, parsing JSON fields for core skills and seniority levels.

methods.name: bulkInsertRoles(roles)
methods.description: Inserts multiple roles into the roles table, generating UUIDs if roleId is not provided.

methods.name: _roleExists(roleId)
methods.description: Checks if a role with the given roleId exists in the database.

methods.name: _parseSalaryRangeToBounds(s)
methods.description: Converts a salary range string into numeric minimum and maximum bounds.

methods.name: _roleSkillsContainAll(roleSkills, requiredSkills)
methods.description: Verifies whether the role's skills contain all required skills, case-insensitive.

methods.name: searchRoles({ q = '', industry = null, skills = [], minSalary = null, maxSalary = null, limit = 50 } = {})
methods.description: Performs a flexible search for roles based on keyword, industry, skills, and salary constraints, returning matching roles with metadata.

ctags.name: searchRoles
ctags.pattern: /^async function searchRoles({ q = '', industry = null, skills = [], minSalary = null, maxSalary =/
ctags.signature: ({ q = '', industry = null, skills = [], minSalary = null, maxSalary = null, limit = 50 } = {})
